intro: Neodissochaeta celebica, also known as Celebes rhubarb, is a type of plant species belonging to the family of Gentianaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, and is known for its potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The bioactive constituents of Neodissochaeta celebica include iridoid glycosides, which are compounds that have been found to possess medicinal properties.
